perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a brown top and the other in a purple ruffled top and grey hat, stand in front of a heated display case filled with rotisserie chicken at a Costco. They look directly at the camera with wide eyes and open mouths, gesturing excitedly. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of plastic-wrapped chicken legs on the shelf, with price tags showing $198 for 4 pieces. (3) The scene returns to the two women who continue talking enthusiastically, using hand gestures to count and give thumbs-up signs while pointing towards the chicken display behind them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately. Two female voices speak in high-pitched, excited Mandarin tones. (2) One woman's voice becomes more prominent as she explains price points, while the background music maintains a consistent, energetic beat. (3) The voices overlap slightly with expressions of excitement and agreement, ending with an enthusiastic call to action as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "你知道嗎？好市多" - Hook text in white with a yellow border, curious tone. (2) "有小家庭份量了" - Functional text in white on a purple background, informative tone. (3) "烤雞腿終於砍半賣" - Informative text highlighting the core news, urgent tone. (4) "一大福音啊！" - Decorative emotional text with stars, celebratory tone. (5) Price breakdowns like "4入一隻只要49.5元" appear as floating captions to support the narration.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Product Close-up/Price Proof -> Benefit Analysis/CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators visible from the waist up throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a brown off-the-shoulder top with a black skirt; the other has shoulder-length dark hair, wears a purple ruffled top, black skirt, and a grey fisherman hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco rotisserie chicken section with heated shelves, red price signs, and various packaged meats visible behind a glass partition.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform and excite Costco members about the introduction of smaller, more convenient packaging for rotisserie chicken legs, specifically targeting small households or individuals who found the previous large quantities difficult to consume.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are showcasing a specific new product packaging at a specific retailer (Costco) and encouraging viewers to share the news.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy duo presentation with synchronized reactions and variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form vlog aesthetics to make a mundane grocery store update feel like a significant life hack or 'great news' for consumers.
